response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant domain expertise in geospatial data platforms and high-performance distributed systems. However, his lack of recent production experience in C++ or Rust makes him a slight technical mismatch, though his systems-level DLang background and strong testing practices suggest he could adapt quickly.
strengths: Extensive domain experience in geospatial data processing and mapping platforms (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship, rigorous testing (TDD), and quality assurance, aligning perfectly with the reliability requirements.
concerns: Lacks recent, production-level experience with modern C++ or Rust, relying mostly on DLang, TypeScript, and Node.js in recent roles.
Limited explicit experience with routing algorithms or dedicated navigation guidance solutions, focusing more on general GIS and mapping.
History of concurrent roles and frequent job changes might raise questions about long-term focus for a dedicated full-time individual contributor position.
